message:
fix(ci): unset global zig cache env vars in cross-compilation wrappers

Repo-level ZIG_GLOBAL_CACHE_DIR/ZIG_LOCAL_CACHE_DIR override the
per-wrapper exports, causing AccessDenied races when goreleaser
builds multiple targets in parallel.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew

files.patch:
@@ -51,10 +51,11 @@ jobs:
             name="${pair%%:*}"
             target="${pair##*:}"
             # Each wrapper gets its own zig cache to avoid AccessDenied races
-            # when goreleaser builds multiple targets in parallel
+            # when goreleaser builds multiple targets in parallel.
+            # Must unset first because repo/workflow env vars override exports.
             cache_dir="/tmp/zigcc/cache-${target}"
             mkdir -p "$cache_dir"
-            printf '#!/bin/sh\nexport ZIG_GLOBAL_CACHE_DIR=%s\nexport ZIG_LOCAL_CACHE_DIR=%s\nexec zig cc -target %s "$@"\n' \
+            printf '#!/bin/sh\nunset ZIG_GLOBAL_CACHE_DIR ZIG_LOCAL_CACHE_DIR\nexport ZIG_GLOBAL_CACHE_DIR=%s\nexport ZIG_LOCAL_CACHE_DIR=%s\nexec zig cc -target %s "$@"\n' \
               "$cache_dir" "$cache_dir" "$target" > "/tmp/zigcc/$name"
             chmod +x "/tmp/zigcc/$name"
           done
